message:
test(readme): cover Series indexing + utility methods (fd90.240 / br-a5842)

Extends readme_element_wise_operations_compiles_and_runs to cover 8
Series methods that previously had no integration coverage:

- Series.loc(&[IndexLabel]) — label-based selection
- Series.iloc(&[i64]) — positional selection
- Series.copy() — deep clone
- Series.empty() — false for non-empty
- Series.append(other) — verified length doubles after appending self
- Series.to_frame(Some(name)) — promote to single-column DataFrame
- Series.sort_index(true|false) — both directions
- Series.reset_index_with_name(drop, name) — drop=true variant

Verified: 35 integration tests + 7 lib tests + 2 doctests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

 {"id":"frankenpandas-a2sck","title":"fd90.139: fd90.138's where_mask_df_other duplicates pre-existing where_cond_df — convert to delegator","description":"fd90.74-138 self-review found a regression in fd90.138: the new where_mask_df_other (line 18640) is functionally identical to the pre-existing where_cond_df (line 18545). Both:
  - take (cond: &Self, other: &Self)
  - return Result<Self, FrameError>
  - implement: where cond=true keep self, where cond=false take from other (with NaN for missing)
  - use the same alignment + per-column reindex pattern

I missed where_cond_df in the fd90.136 audit because I grep'd for 'where_mask' not 'where_cond'. The codebase has two parallel naming schemes (where_cond / where_mask) for similar operations.

Fix-forward (don't revert fd90.138 history; that already shipped to origin):
1. Convert where_mask_df_other into a thin delegator that calls where_cond_df. This keeps the API symmetry that fd90.136 wanted (mask_df_other ↔ where_mask_df_other) without duplicating code.
2. Keep the new test (it exercises the public surface — same input passes through delegation).
3. Update the README to mention both names exist (where_cond_df is the canonical implementation; where_mask_df_other is the symmetry alias for users matching mask_df_other).

Verify with cargo build -p fp-frame + cargo test -p fp-frame --lib where (all 4 should pass: df_where_mask_df, df_where_mask_df_ignores_extra_rows, df_where_mask_df_other_with_dataframe_replacement, plus existing where_cond_df tests). Pure refactor — no behavior change.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-04-26T13:05:35.865579916Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-26T13:07:55.173583699Z","closed_at":"2026-04-26T13:07:55.170975440Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
+{"id":"frankenpandas-a5842","title":"fd90.240: Cover Series.loc/iloc/copy/append/empty/to_frame/reset_index/sort_index","description":"fd90.240: Cover Series.loc / iloc / copy / append / empty / to_frame / reset_index / sort_index.

Eight Series indexing/utility methods uncovered:
- Series.loc(labels: &[IndexLabel]) (line 2527)
- Series.iloc(positions: &[i64]) (line 2556)
- Series.copy() (line 1317)
- Series.append(other) (line 1992)
- Series.empty() (line 5276)
- Series.to_frame(name: Option<&str>) (line 5493)
- Series.sort_index(ascending) (line 2703)
- Series.reset_index_with_name (line 5293)

Scope:
- Extend an existing test with all 8 calls.
